glosses.ja: 設立する; 設置する

sentences.target: On établit une liste pour les courses.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ etabli yn list puʁ le kuʁs/

translations.fr: On établit une liste pour les courses.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ etabli yn list puʁ le kuʁs/
translations.en: We’re making a list for groceries.
translations.es: Estamos haciendo una lista de compras.
translations.it: Stiamo facendo la lista della spesa.
translations.pt: Estamos fazendo uma lista de compras.
translations.tr: Market alışverişi için bir liste yapıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang lập danh sách mua sắm.
translations.hi: हम किराने की सूची बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Φτιάχνουμε μια λίστα για τα ψώνια.
translations.ja: 買い物リストを作っています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun; subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'liste'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'établit'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/complement.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'courses'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'pour' (idiomatically 'les courses' = shopping).

sentences.target: Je veux établir un budget ce mois-ci.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø etabliʁ œ̃ bydʒɛ sə mwa si/

translations.fr: Je veux établir un budget ce mois-ci.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø etabliʁ œ̃ bydʒɛ sə mwa si/
translations.en: I want to set up a budget this month.
translations.es: Quiero hacer un presupuesto este mes.
translations.de: Ich möchte diesen Monat ein Budget aufstellen.
translations.it: Voglio impostare un budget questo mese.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想这个月制定一个预算。
translations.ru: Я хочу составить бюджет в этом месяце.
translations.pt: Quero fazer um orçamento este mês.
translations.tr: Bu ay bir bütçe oluşturmak istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn lập ngân sách tháng này.
translations.nl: Ik wil deze maand een budget opstellen.
translations.uk: Я хочу скласти бюджет цього місяця.
translations.hu: Ebben a hónapban költségvetést szeretnék készíteni.
translations.hi: मैं इस महीने बजट बनाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chcę ustalić budżet na ten miesiąc.
translations.el: Θέλω να φτιάξω έναν προϋπολογισμό αυτόν τον μήνα.
translations.nb: Jeg vil sette opp et budsjett denne måneden.
translations.id: Saya ingin menyusun anggaran bulan ini.
translations.sv: Jag vill sätta upp en budget den här månaden.
translations.ro: Vreau să fac un buget luna asta.
translations.da: Jeg vil lægge et budget denne måned.
translations.ja: 今月は予算を立てたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'veux'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular.
Infinitive verb; complement (xcomp) of 'veux' expressing the desired action.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'budget'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'établir'.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies 'mois' in the expression 'ce mois-ci'.
Common noun, masculine; head of the temporal expression 'ce mois-ci'.
Particle marking proximity in the demonstrative compound '-ci' ('this' as opposed to '-là').

sentences.target: Tu établis le planning de demain.

translations.fr: Tu établis le planning de demain.
translations.es: Estás preparando el horario de mañana.
translations.de: Du erstellst den Plan für morgen.
translations.it: Stai preparando il programma di domani.
translations.yue: 你喺度安排聽日嘅行程。
translations.pt: Você está organizando a agenda de amanhã.
translations.he: אתה מסדר את לוח הזמנים למחר.
translations.vi: Bạn đang sắp xếp lịch cho ngày mai.
translations.nl: Je maakt het schema voor morgen.
translations.hi: तुम कल का कार्यक्रम बना रहे हो.
translations.nb: Du lager planen for i morgen.
translations.id: Kamu sedang menyusun jadwal untuk besok.
translations.sv: Du gör schemat för i morgon.
translations.da: Du laver planen for i morgen.
translations.ja: あなたは明日の予定を立てています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'établis'.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'planning'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'établis'.
Preposition introducing a nominal/temporal complement.
Temporal adverb; here used as a complement to 'planning' via 'de'.

sentences.target: Nous établissons les règles pour le club.
sentences.reading: /nu etablisɔ̃ le ʁɛɡl puʁ lə klœb/

translations.fr: Nous établissons les règles pour le club.
translations.ipa: /nu etablisɔ̃ le ʁɛɡl puʁ lə klœb/
translations.en: We’re establishing the rules for the club.
translations.es: Estamos estableciendo las reglas del club.
translations.de: Wir legen die Regeln für den Verein fest.
translations.it: Stiamo stabilendo le regole per il club.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在制定俱乐部的规则。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度制定俱樂部嘅規則。
translations.pt: Estamos estabelecendo as regras do clube.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đặt ra các quy định cho câu lạc bộ.
translations.nl: We stellen de regels voor de club vast.
translations.hi: हम क्लब के लिए नियम तय कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Καθορίζουμε τους κανόνες για το κλαμπ.
translations.id: Kami sedang menetapkan aturan untuk klub.
translations.ja: クラブの規則を定めています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of 'établissons'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'règles'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'établissons'.
Preposition indicating purpose/beneficiary.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'club'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'pour' indicating the organization.
